theme: Dark with warm gold/beige accents (Archetype 5: Luxury / Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy)
vibe: Meditative, spiritual, calm, stillness, modern, refined, clear typography

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#F4F0E6] leading-tight
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-serif tracking-tight text-[#F4F0E6]
rules.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#E2D1B3] font-semibold

layout_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

components.primary_button: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#C5A059] text-[#0A0E17] font-semibold font-sans rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.secondary_button: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37]/50 hover:border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] font-sans rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
components.glass_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0E17]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E2D1B3]/10 transition-all duration-300
components.card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#131B2A] border border-[#E2D1B3]/5 p-8 lg:p-12 group hover:border-[#D4AF37]/20 transition-all duration-500 rounded-2xl
components.input_field: w-full bg-[#1C273D] border border-[#E2D1B3]/10 text-[#F4F0E6] px-6 py-4 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all placeholder:text-[#9AA3B5]

image_urls.description: Cozy ambiance with books and coffee cup in shadows, for meditative hero background
Monochrome zen stone stack for 'Skupienie / Focus' feature
Dimly lit corner desk illuminated by warm lamp for 'Timer sesji' feature
Open book beside teacup for 'Cytaty z Pisma Świętego' feature

home.content: Logo (SELAH), Nav Links, Language Switcher (PL/EN auto-detect), CTA

Headline 'SELAH – Skupienie i Modlitwa', Subheadline 'Prosta aplikacja pomagająca budować rytm pracy, wyciszenia, modlitwy i odpoczynku.', CTA 'Powiadom mnie o premierze', App Store / Google Play 'Coming Soon' badges. Heavy image overlay (bg-[#0A0E17]/60) over the hero image.
Text-heavy poetic description focusing on the rhythm of work and rest in intervals.
Step flow: 1. Skup się (Focus) 2. Przerwa (Break) 3. Refleksja (Reflection) 4. Odpoczynek (Rest). Use vertical timeline or sequential cards with gold accents.

Bento Grid containing: Timer sesji skupienia, Wybór czasu trwania, Krótkie przerwy, Dłuższa przerwa po cyklach, Statystyki, Raporty postępów, Osiągnięcia, Cytaty z Pisma Świętego. Use icons (lucide-react) and images for some cards.
Lepsze zarządzanie czasem, spokojny rytm, ograniczenie rozproszeń, regularność, połączenie skupienia z modlitwą.
Message emphasizing 'No account, no email required for core features'. Minimalist lock icon.
Form to subscribe for launch. Contact via email: MCS_KONTAKT@HOTMAIL.COM. Use Shadcn forms.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'lucide-react' for calm, thin-stroke icons.
Install Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' (for headings) and 'Manrope' (for body text). Add them to tailwind.config.js.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page layout (Bento Grids, Hero). Avoid Shadcn generic 'Card' for creative layouts.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the interactive bits: Accordion (FAQ), Input/Form (Newsletter/Contact), Select (Language Switcher).
Make sure the PL/EN language switcher uses simple context or i18n logic based on the user's navigator.language if possible, defaulting to PL for 'pl' and EN for others.
Ensure the hero image has a significant overlay (bg-[#0A0E17]/60 or a gradient) so the light text has minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
For the Bento Grid layout, use Mode A: The Tetris Grid strategy (asymmetrical span logic with generous gaps like gap-6 or gap-8).
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="newsletter-submit"`).
The contact email to display is MCS_KONTAKT@HOTMAIL.COM.
Ensure page supports Next.js/React standard routing to /regulamin and /polityka-prywatnosci which will house standard text components.
Keep animations subtle. Use Framer Motion for soft fade-ins and slow upward drifts (e.g., y: 20 -> y: 0, opacity: 0 -> 1, duration: 0.8s) when sections scroll into view.
